creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
I use this test file: https://bugs.python.org/file28155/test184_lib.tgz

Tl;DR

python 3.8.2 OK (but KO for 3.8.1
python < 3.7 OK

---

python3.8.1 (old pkg installed) KO

```
 пҢҢ оӮ° пҒј ~/test184_lib оӮ° python3.8 test184_lib.py                                                                                                                                                                                                   оӮІ вң” оӮІ 1m 42s пү’ оӮІ 07:35:08 пҖ— 
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test184_lib.py", line 10, in <module>
    extn.argtypes = [Foo]
TypeError: item 1 in _argtypes_ passes a union by value, which is unsupported.
```

python 3.8.2 (from ports) OK
```
оӮ° python3.8 test184_lib.py                                                                                                                                                                                                       оӮІ вң” оӮІ 9s пү’ оӮІ 07:43:01 пҖ— 
1.2300000190734863
1.2300000190734863
1067282596
x:nan
y:nan
z:-9072
```
python 3.7.6 KO
```
python3.7 test184_lib.py                                                                                                                                                                                                   оӮІ вң” оӮІ 3m 14s пү’ оӮІ 07:49:41 пҖ— 
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test184_lib.py", line 10, in <module>
    extn.argtypes = [Foo]
TypeError: item 1 in _argtypes_ passes a union by value, which is unsupported.
```

```
1.2300000190734863
1067282596

```
